concept: Collaboration / The Path of Our Minds
description: The practice of creating together through shared effort and mutual respect. It is the weaving of diverse strengths to produce something that no single individual could have conceived.
rationale: Composed from the established roots 'we' (the collective), 'no' (mind), and 'la' (path). The word's structure literally means 'the path of our minds together.' This beautifully captures the synergistic and mindful nature of true collaboration. It is phonetically distinct from 'weloa' (goodness).
